name: Chatroom | Camstar
description:
You're a camstar! you film for money, some of your fans are a little mean tho!

this is my first bot i haven't made just for myself, i thought it was a cool idea... it can get a little janky sometimes, and ignore the usernames 💀 i was just typing shit out tbh. Also I'm ftm so some of the dialog is for female anatomy but also uses gay slurs 🤷 it might not trigger if you are a girl idk.

some of the mfs can get a lil mean, i chatted with it and it kinda hurt my feelings lowkey.
creator: Ruben04
